productDisplayName: Turtle Men Check Navy Blue Shirt
description: CompositionNavy blue check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemFitSlimWash careDelicate cold washHang to dry in shadeIron with medium heatDo not bleachA stylish cut and a flattering silhouette are the reasons why you should grab this shirt from turtle. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project, in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa. For those who are conscious of both the environment and fashion, this shirt is the right way to go! This shirt is best worn with corduroy trousers or jeans, with a similarly toned belt and shoes, or for a formal appeal, style this with chinos and formal shoes. Model statisticsProduct is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
